description:
What: At end of Cheney GC, walk from-space. For each non-forwarded (dead) object, scan its FzValue fields for pointers into RC arena (address-range check), rc_dec each.

Why: Cross-region cleanup. A Cheney object holding an RC pointer must release its +1 when the holder dies.

CLIF impact: runtime-only.

Removes: nothing.

Tests: stress test mixed-arena workload; assert no RC leaks after Cheney GC.
title: fz-dps.B3: Cheney from-space sweep rc_dec on dead holders
